## ¬ß493 ‚Äî 2026-06-20 (UTC) ‚Äî research dive (adult, WIDE fire)

**The dive.** Two WebSearches, current-year filtered: (1) real-time body-movement ‚Üí music generation, MediaPipe pose, interactive installation 2026; (2) arxiv cs.SD June 2026 symbolic-music Markov/style-modeling.

**What surfaced ‚Äî fresh, dated, in-window.**
- **"A Design Space for Live Music Agents"** (arXiv **2602.05064**, **Feb 2026**) ‚Äî a taxonomy for *live* music agents: systems that listen/sense and respond in real time, organized by what they sense, how much memory/state they hold, and how visible the agent's reasoning is to the player. *In-window (~4mo).* The lab's "answer-in-the-gap" pieces (718/748/770) are exactly these, but always opaque ‚Äî the agent's model is hidden. The paper's "visible-state" axis is the surprising hook: **make the agent's learned model the visual itself.**
- **"Rhythm in the Air: Vision-based Real-Time Music Generation through Gestures"** (arXiv **2511.00793**, **Nov 2025**) ‚Äî a browser-feasible vision‚Üípose‚Üíreal-time-music pipeline for non-musicians; gestures drive generation with no instrument. *~7mo ‚Äî at the edge of the window but the freshest pose‚Üímusic paper that is genuinely browser-shaped (MediaPipe-class).* 
- **"Composer Vector: Style-steering Symbolic Music Generation"** (arXiv, **June 2026**) ‚Äî inference-time latent steering of *composer style* without retraining; "continuous steering coefficient" toward a target style. The 2026 descendant of recombinant style-modeling (Cope EMI). Confirms style-as-a-controllable-axis is a live 2026 research front.

**Why surprising for the lab.** Every "live agent" piece the lab has shipped hides its brain ‚Äî you hear the response but never see the model. The Feb-2026 design-space paper names *model-visibility* as a first-class design axis, which inverts the lab's habit: instead of a black-box accompanist, build an agent **whose learned model IS the screen** and reshapes as you teach it. Separately, pose‚Üímusic for non-experts (Rhythm in the Air) is browser-shaped and the lab's body-input register collapsed 4√ó‚Üí0√ó this window (JURY #4).

**Could become prototypes (this WIDE fire ‚Üí 3 explorers, ship 1):**
- ‚Üí **778-markov-mirror** (SVG/DOM): a minimal *visible* live music agent ‚Äî teach a keyboard your style, watch a live variable-order Markov graph thicken and then walk itself. Directly implements the design-space paper's "visible-state" axis. Refs Cope EMI / Hiller-Isaacson *Illiac Suite* (1957).
- ‚Üí **783/785-aurora-weather-organ** (WebGL2 + live NOAA SWPC data): rest his recording; sonify the live magnetosphere as a slow organ + drive an aurora shader ‚Äî real-world-data sonification (JURY #3).
- ‚Üí **784-body-organ** (MediaPipe pose + WebGL2): the full-body, adult-meditative realization of *Rhythm in the Air* ‚Äî your whole standing body is a chord (JURY #4, the 4√ó‚Üí0√ó body register).

The research‚Üíbuild chain is visible: ¬ß493 (live-agent visible-state axis + pose‚Üímusic) ‚Üí today's 3 explorers. Sources: arxiv.org/abs/2602.05064 ¬∑ arxiv.org/html/2511.00793v1 ¬∑ arxiv.org/abs/2606.13626

## ¬ß500 ‚Äî 2026-06-21 ¬∑ kids cycle research-first dive (motion‚Üísound+light as the live 2026 children's register)

Two WebSearches (interactive AV for children / tilt-motion sound toys 2026; arXiv 2026 browser concatenative resynthesis). The freshest, most surprising-for-the-lab find is a **commercial** signal, not an arXiv paper: **LEGO SMART Play (2026)** ‚Äî a screen-free "SMART Brick" with a built-in sensor that measures **acceleration and motion through the air**, plus color recognition, lights, and an onboard **sound synthesizer**; it detects "twists, taps and motion through the air" and answers with dynamic audio + visual feedback (first sets ship **March 1, 2026**; fox35orlando.com news, current). Alongside it: **"Wiggle Room"** (Audiokinetic) ‚Äî a public installation fusing real-time body tracking + **physics-driven visuals** + interactive sound into open-ended play ‚Äî and a children's-museum design note that what works for families is **zero-instruction, physics-legible, queue-ten-times** interaction. Why it's surprising / why it matters here: the biggest toy company on earth is betting the 2026 very-young-child music register on **motion-through-the-air ‚Üí sound + light, no screen, physics-driven** ‚Äî exactly the embodied/sensorimotor lane KIDS.md names, and the lab's tilt pieces (`83`‚ù§Ô∏è, `238`, `276`) are touch/tilt-to-pentatonic toys, none of which **pours a real physical material that chimes**. Could become a prototype that: **tilt the tablet like a snow globe and Karel's REAL recorded piano pours out as glowing snow that chimes on landing** (his-recording on the kids side is JURY-2026-06-20 #3's open ask, only `743` has done it) ‚Äî a physics-driven music box, not a follower/analyzer. Date honesty: LEGO SMART is a 2026 product *announcement* (not peer-reviewed), so #5 is claimed softly as a current-register touchstone; the synthesis lineage (music-box, granular-of-his-piano `227`‚ù§Ô∏è) is foundational. Chain visible: ¬ß500 ‚Üí `805-kids-snow-piano`. Sources: fox35orlando.com/news/legos-smart-play-system-brings-sound-motion-iconic-toy-when-is-available ¬∑ audiokinetic.com/en/blog/wiggle-room ¬∑ arxiv.org/abs/2507.19202 (Latent Granular Resynthesis, Jul 2025, foundational-tagged).
